calendar.matters:
Petition For Termination Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-26-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Barulich and Alexandra Banis for Lynne Simon and Leslie Simon. Paul Spalding current Trustee also present.

The Court stated that $207,000.00 for administration fees seem very high and that it does not see why ongoing fees should remain high. Ms. Banis stated that the clients feel they can manage their own funds, that language in the trust/terms were for tax purposes, that there are no tax issues and that the purpose of the trust has already been accomplished. The Court stated that it is not inclined to terminate the trust. The Petition for Termination of Trust was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Termination Of Trust
Off Calendar Feb-18-2014 Continued To Mar-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
